script:
set -e; APP=d5b6a545-66d0-4a68-8967-4dd5f2c5c981; TEN=50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c; echo '===== STEP A: vault secret valid? ====='; VS=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name rosi-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv); RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TEN/oauth2/v2.0/token" --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$VS" --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default'); VAULT_OK=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print("yes" if json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token") else "no")'); echo "  vault secret valid: $VAULT_OK"; if [ "$VAULT_OK" != "yes" ]; then CS=$(jq -r .client_secret /home/azureuser/.rosi-bot/creds.json); echo '  syncing vault to match creds.json (which we know works)'; printf '%s' "$CS" | az keyvault secret set --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name rosi-bot-client-secret --file /dev/stdin -o none && echo '  vault updated'; fi; unset VS CS; echo; echo '===== STEP B: build v1.2 zip with rename ====='; SRC=/home/azureuser/rosi-teams-app.zip; DST=/home/azureuser/rosi-teams-app/rosi-teams-app-v1.2.zip; WORK=$(mktemp -d); cd $WORK; unzip -q $SRC; python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('manifest.json')); m['name']['short']='Rosi Claude'; m['version']='1.2.0'; json.dump(m, open('manifest.json','w'), indent=2)"; rm -f $DST; zip -q $DST manifest.json color.png outline.png; echo "  built: $DST ($(stat -c '%s' $DST) bytes)"; unzip -p $DST manifest.json | jq '{version, name: .name, scopes: .bots[0].scopes}'; echo; echo '===== STEP C: upload to catalog ====='; TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh); RESP=$(curl -sS -w "
__HTTP__:%{http_code}" -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?requiresReview=false" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/zip" --data-binary @$DST); CODE=$(echo "$RESP" | grep -o '__HTTP__:[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); echo "  http_code=$CODE"; CATID=$(echo "$RESP" | grep -v '__HTTP__' | jq -r '.id // .error.code // ""' 2>/dev/null); echo "  catalog_id: $CATID"; if [ "$CODE" = "201" ] && [ -n "$CATID" ]; then echo; echo '===== STEP D: set env var + restart ====='; for svc in rosi-bot rosi-responder; do sudo mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/$svc.service.d; printf '[Service]
Environment="ROSI_TEAMS_CATALOG_ID=%s"
' "$CATID" | sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/$svc.service.d/catalog-id.conf >/dev/null; done; sudo systemctl daemon-reload; sudo systemctl restart rosi-bot.service rosi-responder.service; sleep 2; systemctl is-active rosi-bot.service rosi-responder.service; else echo '  upload failed; not setting env var'; echo "$RESP" | head -10; fi; rm -rf $WORK
